files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,10 @@ jobs:
         with:
           enable-cache: true
 
+      - name: Install skills-ref
+        shell: bash
+        run: uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
+
       - name: Validate skills with skills-ref
         shell: bash
         run: |
@@ -39,5 +43,5 @@ jobs:
 
           for skill_dir in "${skill_dirs[@]}"; do
             echo "Validating ${skill_dir}"
-            uvx --refresh skills-ref validate "${skill_dir}"
+            skills-ref validate "${skill_dir}"
           done

@@ -163,6 +163,10 @@ jobs:
         with:
           enable-cache: true
 
+      - name: Install skills-ref
+        shell: bash
+        run: uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
+
       - name: Validate skills with skills-ref
         shell: bash
         run: |
@@ -174,7 +178,7 @@ jobs:
 
           for skill_dir in "${skill_dirs[@]}"; do
             echo "Validating ${skill_dir}"
-            uvx --refresh skills-ref validate "${skill_dir}"
+            skills-ref validate "${skill_dir}"
           done
 
       - name: Stage changes

@@ -6,8 +6,9 @@ Run `skills-ref` across every local skill after changing anything under
 `skills/`:
 
 ```bash
+uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
 for skill in $(find skills -name SKILL.md -print | sed 's#/SKILL.md$##'); do
-  uvx --refresh skills-ref validate "$skill"
+  skills-ref validate "$skill"
 done
 ```
